title: Add firrtl backend support for generic parameters in blackbox components
body:
Previous blackbox components were just emitted with their interface ports, but their generic parameters were never emitted and it was therefore impossible to customize them.

This commit adds support for blackbox generic parameters, though support is only provided for INTEGER and STRING parameters. Other types of parameters would result in undefined behavior here.

This PR allows one to start from synthesized verilog circuits that contain blackbox definitions and convert them to firrtl. A small example is provided below:

Input synthesized verilog:
```verilog
module test (
  out_0,
  out_1,
  in_0,
  in_1);
output 	out_0;
output  out_1;
input 	in_0;
input 	in_1;

wire gnd;
wire vcc;

assign gnd = 1'b0;
assign vcc = 1'b1;

wire FIRST_combout;
wire SECOND_combout;

fourteennm_lcell_comb FIRST (
  .dataa(in_0),
  .datab(in_1),
  .datac(gnd),
  .datad(gnd),
  .datae(gnd),
  .dataf(gnd),
  .datag(gnd),
  .datah(gnd),
  .cin(gnd),
  .sharein(gnd),
  .combout(FIRST_combout),
  .sumout(),
  .cout(),
  .shareout());
defparam FIRST .extended_lut = "off";
defparam FIRST .lut_mask = 64'h1212121212121212;
defparam FIRST .shared_arith = "off";

fourteennm_lcell_comb SECOND (
  .dataa(in_0),
  .datab(in_1),
  .datac(gnd),
  .datad(gnd),
  .datae(gnd),
  .dataf(gnd),
  .datag(gnd),
  .datah(gnd),
  .cin(gnd),
  .sharein(gnd),
  .combout(SECOND_combout),
  .sumout(),
  .cout(),
  .shareout());
defparam SECOND .extended_lut = "off";
defparam SECOND .lut_mask = 64'h1234FFFFFFFF1234;
defparam SECOND .shared_arith = "off";

assign out_0 = FIRST_combout;
assign out_1 = SECOND_combout;

endmodule
```
The converted firrtl circuit is the following:

```verilog
circuit test:
  extmodule fourteennm_lcell_comb_FIRST:
    input cin: UInt<1>
    output combout: UInt<1>
    output cout: UInt<1>
    input dataa: UInt<1>
    input datab: UInt<1>
    input datac: UInt<1>
    input datad: UInt<1>
    input datae: UInt<1>
    input dataf: UInt<1>
    input datag: UInt<1>
    input datah: UInt<1>
    input sharein: UInt<1>
    output shareout: UInt<1>
    output sumout: UInt<1>
    defname = fourteennm_lcell_comb
    parameter extended_lut = "off"
    parameter lut_mask = "b0001001000010010000100100001001000010010000100100001001000010010"
    parameter shared_arith = "off"

  extmodule fourteennm_lcell_comb_SECOND:
    input cin: UInt<1>
    output combout: UInt<1>
    output cout: UInt<1>
    input dataa: UInt<1>
    input datab: UInt<1>
    input datac: UInt<1>
    input datad: UInt<1>
    input datae: UInt<1>
    input dataf: UInt<1>
    input datag: UInt<1>
    input datah: UInt<1>
    input sharein: UInt<1>
    output shareout: UInt<1>
    output sumout: UInt<1>
    defname = fourteennm_lcell_comb
    parameter extended_lut = "off"
    parameter lut_mask = "b0001001000110100111111111111111111111111111111110001001000110100"
    parameter shared_arith = "off"

  module test:
    input in_0: UInt<1>
    input in_1: UInt<1>
    output out_0: UInt<1>
    output out_1: UInt<1>

    out_0 is invalid
    out_1 is invalid

    inst FIRST of fourteennm_lcell_comb_FIRST
    FIRST.cin <= UInt<1>("h0")
    out_0 <= FIRST.combout
    FIRST.dataa <= in_0
    FIRST.datab <= in_1
    FIRST.datac <= UInt<1>("h0")
    FIRST.datad <= UInt<1>("h0")
    FIRST.datae <= UInt<1>("h0")
    FIRST.dataf <= UInt<1>("h0")
    FIRST.datag <= UInt<1>("h0")
    FIRST.datah <= UInt<1>("h0")
    FIRST.sharein <= UInt<1>("h0")
    inst SECOND of fourteennm_lcell_comb_SECOND
    SECOND.cin <= UInt<1>("h0")
    out_1 <= SECOND.combout
    SECOND.dataa <= in_0
    SECOND.datab <= in_1
    SECOND.datac <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.datad <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.datae <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.dataf <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.datag <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.datah <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.sharein <= UInt<1>("h0")
```

    FIRST.sharein <= UInt<1>("h0")
    inst SECOND of fourteennm_lcell_comb_SECOND
    SECOND.cin <= UInt<1>("h0")
    out_1 <= SECOND.combout
    SECOND.dataa <= in_0
    SECOND.datab <= in_1
    SECOND.datac <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.datad <= UInt<1>("h0")

    SECOND.datag <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.datah <= UInt<1>("h0")
    SECOND.sharein <= UInt<1>("h0")
